overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy urban night scene in a video game. The player walks along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees as vehicles drive past on a multi-lane road, with a white sports car crashing near the curb. Modern glass office buildings illuminate the background with artificial lighting reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement.

landscaped flower beds with colorful blooms along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in an urban environment, walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees. A distinctive curved glass office building dominates the left skyline, while street lamps cast warm light onto the wet pavement. The road to the left has sparse traffic moving through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street section where vehicle incident occurs

white sports car loses control and crashes into palm tree or street furniture, coming to abrupt stop

segments.scene_description: A white sports car enters from the left driving at high speed on the wet road, loses traction, and crashes into a tree or street furniture, coming to a stop near the sidewalk. The camera continues walking past the incident as rain continues to fall, with the curved glass building now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with traffic signals

events.description: walking past the stopped white sports car on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the crashed vehicle and approaching the intersection ahead

traffic signals showing red lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past the stationary white sports car and continues toward an intersection. The curved glass building recedes into the distance on the left, while traffic lights become visible ahead. Palm trees now line the right side of the path as the rain continues to fall on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy urban corridor that transitions from a view of a towering glass skyline to an open city intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, where warm street lamps illuminate the wet pavement and a curved glass office building dominates the left skyline. As the camera moves forward, a white sports car suddenly streaks into view from the left, losing traction and crashing into the roadside furniture before coming to a halt. The camera continues walking past the wreckage, causing the glass building to recede into the distance as the rain persists. The scene then opens up toward a distant intersection, with the path shifting so that palm trees now line the right side of the sidewalk under the glow of approaching traffic lights.
